jobs.title: Assistant Professor of Audio Production
jobs.description: MFA or doctorate in audio/media production (by June 2027), demonstrated expertise in digital audio workstation software (Pro Tools preferred), studio recording/mixing or sound design experience, success or potential in undergraduate teaching, record of scholarship/creative activity.

jobs.title: IT Audio Engineer
jobs.description: 3-5 years live audio experience (4 years related experience preferred), high school plus specialized training, proficiency with Microsoft OS/Office, networking, multitrack recording and audio/video production, strong communication skills.

jobs.title: Sound Designer
jobs.description: Supervise sound design area, conceptualize and facilitate sound designs, manage purchases and budgets, support audio engineering; high school required; 4 years relevant experience required; bachelor\u0002s preferred.

jobs.title: Sound Designer
jobs.description: 5+ years experience with major DAW, strong music composition, sound design, audio engineering, recording and mixing skills; teamwork and English proficiency required.

jobs.title: Principal Sound Designer
jobs.description: 8+ years games industry sound design experience, shipped AAA titles, expertise in Wwise and real-time audio systems, experience with audio implementation, recording source material, collaborating with engineers, and mentoring teammates.

jobs.title: Principal Sound Designer (Apex Legends)
jobs.description: 10+ years game audio or post-production experience; leadership in audio vision; expertise in sound creation, field/foley recording, mixing (including 5.1); strong collaboration and troubleshooting skills.

new_jobs.title: Sound Designer
new_jobs.description: Supervise sound design area, conceptualize and facilitate sound designs, manage purchases and budgets, support audio engineering; high school required; 4 years relevant experience required; bachelor\u0002s preferred.
